@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "jaeger-1058-collector-reload-sampling-strategies-on-file-content-change",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "jaeger: collector: reload sampling strategies on file content change",
+    "description": "collector: reload sampling strategies on file content change. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current jaeger deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your jaeger version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nhelm list -n observability 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working jaeger installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review jaeger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get configmap -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger\n```\n## Requirement - what kind of business use case are you trying to solve?\n\nIt should be possible to change the sampling strategies without restarting the collector."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for collector: reload sampling strategies on file content change",
+        "description": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\n- Add support for dynamically reloading sampling strategies, resolves #1058 \n\n## Short description of the changes\n- Create new viper instance to watch changes to the sampling strategies file\n- Wrap the sampling strategy store in a `RWMutex` for concurrent access.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get events -n observability --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"collector: reload sampling strategies on file content change\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\n- Add support for dynamically reloading sampling strategies, resolves #1058 \n\n## Short description of the changes\n- Create new viper instance to watch changes to the sampling strategies file\n- Wrap the sampling strategy store in a `RWMutex` for concurrent access.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
